creator: ben@scientia.demon.co.uk
text:
As the synopsis says, ipv6 isn't specified as being a virtual category, when
as far as I can tell, it is.  I certainly have no /usr/ports/ipv6 directory.

Fix: cvs diff: Diffing .


(hardly worth it really :-)--u7pEXviImlQrCTAw1oPFKdSkQ6lsJmnXm0hd7OQslqlFyn6r

                 <entry>IPv6 related software.</entry>
               </row>
